## Checklist

- [ ] My commits are **signed off** (`git commit -s`) per the
      [Developer Certificate of Origin](../DCO) — required to merge (see
      [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)).
- [ ] I read the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] Tests/docs updated as needed; the governance suite and public CI pass.
- [ ] One focused change per PR; large/breaking changes were discussed in an issue first.
